name: Qx
description: 4HP expander for Quadrax. Adds one CV output per Quadrax channel and enables cascade/linking between channels. Output function is set per channel in Quadrax menus.

outputs.name: CH 1 CV Out
outputs.description: Auxiliary CV output for Quadrax channel 1. End-of-cycle gate, end-of-rise gate, or linked CV depending on Quadrax channel mode.

outputs.name: CH 2 CV Out
outputs.description: Auxiliary CV output for Quadrax channel 2. End-of-cycle gate, end-of-rise gate, or linked CV depending on Quadrax channel mode.

outputs.name: CH 3 CV Out
outputs.description: Auxiliary CV output for Quadrax channel 3. End-of-cycle gate, end-of-rise gate, or linked CV depending on Quadrax channel mode.

outputs.name: CH 4 CV Out
outputs.description: Auxiliary CV output for Quadrax channel 4. End-of-cycle gate, end-of-rise gate, or linked CV depending on Quadrax channel mode.

behaviors.name: End-of-Cycle Gate
behaviors.description: When configured in Quadrax, the Qx output fires a short gate at the end of each envelope or LFO cycle — useful for chaining or clocking other modules.

behaviors.name: End-of-Rise Gate
behaviors.description: Fires a gate at the peak of the envelope or function, allowing rhythmic or melodic events to be triggered mid-envelope.

behaviors.name: Channel Cascade / Linking
behaviors.description: Enables daisy-chaining Quadrax channels so the end of one channel triggers the next, creating longer envelope sequences or complex LFO chains.

patchIdeas.name: Envelope cascade sequence
patchIdeas.patch: Qx CH 1 EOC → Quadrax CH 2 trigger · CH 2 EOC → CH 3 trigger · cascading 4-stage envelope
patchIdeas.diagram:
QX:
* CH 1-3: End-of-Cycle mode
- Qx (CH 1 CV Out) t> Quadrax (CH 2 Trig)
- Qx (CH 2 CV Out) t> Quadrax (CH 3 Trig)
- Qx (CH 3 CV Out) t> Quadrax (CH 4 Trig) // 4-stage cascaded envelope

patchIdeas.name: Synchronized secondary triggers
patchIdeas.patch: Qx EOC outputs → trigger inputs on drum voices · percussion synced to envelope timing
patchIdeas.diagram:
QX:
* All channels: End-of-Cycle mode
- Qx (CH 1 CV Out) t> Kick (Trig)
- Qx (CH 2 CV Out) t> Snare (Trig)
- Qx (CH 3 CV Out) t> Hat (Trig)
- Qx (CH 4 CV Out) t> Perc (Trig) // percussion follows envelope endings

patchIdeas.name: LFO reset chain
patchIdeas.patch: Qx CH 1 EOC → Quadrax CH 2 reset · phase-locked polyrhythmic LFOs
patchIdeas.diagram:
QX:
* CH 1: LFO with EOC
- Qx (CH 1 CV Out) t> Quadrax (CH 2 Reset) // phase-locks CH 2 LFO to CH 1
- Quadrax (CH 2 Out) >> VCA (CV)
